must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — Project Meranti — Term Sheet for proposed acquisition of 60% of Lattice BioSystems Ltd. by Coralline Harbour Holdings Ltd.
This draft is not generally available and subject to SGX disclosure embargo until 26 Jun 2026, 08:30 SGT.
Transaction value: S$128,000,000 cash consideration plus up to S$12,000,000 earn-out (10%) based on FY2027 EBITDA.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement under Singapore law; target board memo ref LB-TS-2026-04 to be annexed.
Conditions precedent include: SGX Mainboard Chapter 10 shareholder approval (relative figures estimated at 45%), no MAS objections for ancillary payment services held by target, and completion of due diligence.
Material Adverse Change: customary MAE definition with carve-outs for general market conditions; for clarity, Buyer will not rely on a MAC condition to terminate solely due to sector-wide valuation declines.
Long-stop date: 30 Sep 2026; completion expected within 5 business days thereafter; break fee S$3,200,000 (2.5%).
Non-compete and non-solicit: 24 months for founders; employment terms for Dr. Reyna Chua to include a 3-year service agreement.
Contact: Ms. Mei Lin Koh, Partner, Veridian & Howe LLC, meilin.koh@veridianhowe.sg; Mr. Daryl Ong, CFO, Coralline Harbour Holdings Ltd., daryl.ong@corallineharbour.asia.
Data room contains personal data processed in accordance with PDPA; please anonymise employee files in Schedule 7 prior to external sharing.
No public announcement should be made until board sign-off and the embargo time; references to ‘Project Meranti’ must be removed from any SGXNet draft.
Public-source benchmark: see SGXNet announcement by Heliotrope Pacific Ltd. dated 02 Feb 2025 on its acquisition of a 55% stake in a Catalist issuer.
Representations include compliance with the Securities and Futures Act (Cap. 289) and the SGX Listing Manual; warranties subject to a S$8,000,000 cap and 12-month survival.
Note: there is no assertion that a MAE has occurred as at the date of this term sheet, and the absence of a MAC is not a completion condition for the earn-out.
